name: Day Sky Dome

implementation.mapping: Use as an equirectangular environment texture or apply to the inside of a hemisphere or sphere.
implementation.recommended_geometry: Sphere or hemisphere with inward-facing normals.

orientation.zenith: top edge center of the texture

unity.usage: Import texture, set Max Size to 8192, and map onto an inverted sphere/hemisphere or use a skybox shader that supports lat-long textures.

unreal.usage: Import as Texture2D and plug into an unlit material on an inverted sky sphere.

godot.usage: Use on a SphereMesh with flipped faces or convert for PanoramaSkyMaterial if needed.

visual_description.cloud_style: cumulus and wispy cirrus with horizon haze
visual_description.sky_color: deep blue zenith fading to pale horizon

authoring_note: Texture generated and packaged for skydome use. Best for background skies in 3D engines.
